feedback: The dropdown menu in the header doesn't close when I click outside of it. Pretty annoying when navigating.
Love the new dark theme — it's much easier on the eyes during long work sessions.
Would be great to have a light mode option. The dark background is too harsh for me in bright office environments.
On mobile the navigation bar overlaps the page content when I scroll down. Makes some buttons unreachable.
The new layout feels cleaner overall but I had to spend a few minutes figuring out where everything moved.
Please add keyboard shortcuts. Power users like me rely heavily on them and the new UI removed the ones I used.
Page load time is noticeably faster compared to the old design. Great improvement!
The modal dialog doesn't trap focus properly — pressing Tab jumps outside the modal to background elements.
Font size feels slightly too small on the detail pages. Had to zoom in on my laptop screen.
It would help to have breadcrumb navigation so I always know where I am inside the app.
The new color palette is consistent throughout the whole app. Previous version felt patchy and inconsistent.
Clicking the Save button twice submits the form twice. Needs a loading state to prevent duplicate submissions.
Transition animations feel a bit slow. Would prefer a snappier experience especially when switching between tabs.
Can you add the option to collapse the sidebar? On smaller screens it takes up too much space.
The new empty state illustrations are a nice touch. Much better than just showing a blank white area.
